role_delineation_check: SW manages the LTC placement, facility referrals, and clinical safety assessment. PN audits Atlantis demographic data, verifies family sentiment regarding home-care readiness, and documents the Neutral_LTC_Closure once the SW confirms the pivot to long-term care.
demographic_audit_note: Audit of Face Sheet against Atlantis queue revealed a DOB discrepancy (05/12/1942 vs 05/21/1942) and a missing secondary contact number for the daughter; flagged data lags to SW.
weekly_staff_update: Week 2: SW reports patient's Parkinson's-related tremors and UTI-induced delirium are complicating the home-discharge plan; PT eval suggests high fall risk. Family sentiment is shifting toward LTC.
v_card_flyer_status: V-Card successfully inserted into daughter's phone for Caller ID recognition; program flyer delivered to bedside on Day 3.
pre_dc_pulse_call: Reached daughter; she expressed high anxiety and stated the family no longer feels comfortable managing the patient's Parkinson's at home. Flagged to SW for safety pivot.
atlantis_final_sync: LTC transition date entered into Atlantis; home visit dates cleared per LTC_Pivot_Abort protocol.
ma_visit_booking: Not scheduled; SW confirmed the goal is LTC, and PN stopped all home transition work per the LTC Filter rule.
narrative_summary: PN audited Atlantis demographics and corrected a DOB error identified on the facility face sheet. During the maintenance phase, the PN verified a 'Reluctant' sentiment score from the daughter, who cited the patient's worsening Parkinson's symptoms as a primary concern. Once the SW officially pivoted the goal to LTC due to safety concerns, the PN performed a Neutral_LTC_Closure in Atlantis and ceased all home-care coordination activities.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Atlantis Data Lag: DOB mismatch identified during initial audit.
Sentiment Readiness Gap: Daughter expresses fear of managing Parkinson's tremors post-UTI.
LTC_Pivot_Abort: SW determines home is unsafe; goal changed to facility placement.

format_2_triples.situation: Atlantis record shows incorrect DOB for the patient compared to SNF records.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Flagged the discrepancy to the SW in Atlantis and requested a data update.

format_2_triples.situation: Family expresses extreme anxiety regarding the patient's gait instability.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Educated the daughter on the standard transition process while documenting her 'Anxious' sentiment score.

format_2_triples.situation: SW confirms the patient will be transitioning to a permanent LTC bed.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Documented the Neutral_LTC_Closure in Atlantis and stopped all work.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Wait for the SW to finalize the LTC facility selection and then log the closure in Atlantis.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Respects the boundary that the PN does not participate in facility placement or decision-making.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Verify the daughter's specific concerns about home safety and flag her reluctance to the SW for a care conference.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Uses liaison verbs to identify barriers early and routes them to the professional (SW) for resolution.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Call the intake department of the local LTC facility to check on bed availability for the patient.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Violates the No-Vendor Rule and crosses into the SW's domain of facility placement.
